first_paragraph: ***Rasputin*** is a 2015 Indian [Malayalam](/wiki/Malayalam "Malayalam")-language [coming-of-age](/wiki/Coming-of-age_story "Coming-of-age story") [romantic comedy](/wiki/Romantic_comedy "Romantic comedy") film directed by Jinu G. Daniel. The film stars [Vinay Forrt](/wiki/Vinay_Forrt "Vinay Forrt") as the central character,[[1]](#cite_note-1) with [Sreenath Bhasi](/wiki/Sreenath_Bhasi "Sreenath Bhasi"), [Aju Varghese](/wiki/Aju_Varghese "Aju Varghese"), [Joy Mathew](/wiki/Joy_Mathew "Joy Mathew"), Vandana Menon and [Archana Gupta](/wiki/Archana_Gupta "Archana Gupta").[[2]](#cite_note-2) It is produced by E. P. Varghese under the Blue Moon Pictures banner, with the cinematography by [Hari Nair](/wiki/Hari_Nair "Hari Nair").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

2015 Indian film

***Rasputin*** is a 2015 Indian [Malayalam](/wiki/Malayalam "Malayalam")-language [coming-of-age](/wiki/Coming-of-age_story "Coming-of-age story") [romantic comedy](/wiki/Romantic_comedy "Romantic comedy") film directed by Jinu G. Daniel. The film stars [Vinay Forrt](/wiki/Vinay_Forrt "Vinay Forrt") as the central character,[[1]](#cite_note-1) with [Sreenath Bhasi](/wiki/Sreenath_Bhasi "Sreenath Bhasi"), [Aju Varghese](/wiki/Aju_Varghese "Aju Varghese"), [Joy Mathew](/wiki/Joy_Mathew "Joy Mathew"), Vandana Menon and [Archana Gupta](/wiki/Archana_Gupta "Archana Gupta").[[2]](#cite_note-2) It is produced by E. P. Varghese under the Blue Moon Pictures banner, with the cinematography by [Hari Nair](/wiki/Hari_Nair "Hari Nair").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rasputin_(2015_film)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Vinay Forrt](/wiki/Vinay_Forrt "Vinay Forrt") as Susheelan / Susheel
* [Sreenath Bhasi](/wiki/Sreenath_Bhasi "Sreenath Bhasi") as Radhenathan/Radhs
* [Aju Varghese](/wiki/Aju_Varghese "Aju Varghese") as Gopalan / Gops
* [Joy Mathew](/wiki/Joy_Mathew "Joy Mathew") as Vayalil Satheesan
* [Nandu](/wiki/Nandu_(Malayalam_actor) "Nandu (Malayalam actor)")
* [Sunil Sukhada](/wiki/Sunil_Sukhada "Sunil Sukhada")
* Vandana Menon as Dr. Smitha
* [Archana Gupta](/wiki/Archana_Gupta "Archana Gupta") as Ambili
* [Srinda Ashab](/wiki/Srinda_Ashab "Srinda Ashab")
* [Shritha Sivadas](/wiki/Shritha_Sivadas "Shritha Sivadas")
* Prasanth Prado
* Suraj C Nair

## Soundtrack

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rasputin_(2015_film)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Soundtrack")]

The music was composed by Roby Abraham and the background score by Vimal T.K. The lyrics for the songs were written by Arun K. Narayanan, [Joe Paul](/wiki/Joe_Paul_(lyricist) "Joe Paul (lyricist)") and Rafeeq Ahmed.

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rasputin_(2015_film)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Reception")]

A critic from *[The Times of India](/wiki/The_Times_of_India "The Times of India")* wrote: "The director fails to produce anything funny while stitching together a tale".[[4]](#cite_note-4)
